# Notice (v0.1 Under development)
## From Codebase Structure
- **include/curses.h**
- **include/panel.h**
- **lib/pdcurses.lib**

#### These header files could be downloaded from the [PDCurses GitHub](https://github.com/wmcbrine/PDCurses/) OR [PDCurses Website](https://pdcurses.org/).
#### pdcurses.lib could be generated by any compiler using the toolchain like: 
    Visual Studio Build Toolchain (MSVC)
    MinGW (GCC)

I am not including the .lib you can build it from given site and URL link provided. 

And the path could be set from root → **clown/lib/pdcurses.lib**

Raising issue for mistakes will help me a lot.
### Thank You
